libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 5.0.0, use Jackson 3 package names exposed by victools: import tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode or tools.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode/ArrayNode as appropriate. Do not keep the older com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode import or add Jackson 2 as a workaround; SchemaGenerator.generateSchema now returns tools.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 declares jsonschema-generator as provided, and documented use requires creating a SchemaGenerator/SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder and registering Swagger2Module.
jsonschema-module-swagger-2 declares Swagger 2.x annotations as provided; meaningful coverage uses @Schema/@ArraySchema annotations, and 2.2.41 is the version managed by the 5.0.0 parent.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 4.38.0 tests copied forward may fail javac because they import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode, while 5.0.0 uses Jackson 3 under tools.jackson.*.
The module POM marks key peer APIs as provided, so relying only on the target artifact can leave SchemaGenerator or Swagger annotation types missing from generated tests.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The module is pure in-process and needs no Docker or environment setup, but its normal use requires provided peer dependencies to be present on the test classpath; version 5.0.0 also migrated its schema tree API to Jackson 3 packages.
